final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a sign during the broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact UI detail execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9:16 vertical phone-screen screenshot with live-stream overlay elements (viewer count, comments, like animations, username bar, etc.)
Subject: must include 神仙姐姐 as the live-stream host, holding a handwritten sign in front of her
Scene/backdrop: must include a live-stream room setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, well-lit live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the host
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI layout with on-screen overlays; sign text must be clearly legible
Avoid:
